findings.title: Top recurring: Mgmt Fees
findings.action: Review Mgmt Fees: Mgmt Fees costs $4620/yr — confirm still needed or renegotiate.
findings.why: Mgmt Fees is a monthly charge averaging $385.00 (4 occurrences, $4620/yr annualized).

findings.title: Top recurring: Property Manager Co
findings.action: Review management_fee: Property Manager Co costs $4104/yr — confirm still needed or renegotiate.
findings.why: Property Manager Co is a monthly charge averaging $342.00 (15 occurrences, $4104/yr annualized).

findings.title: Expense spike: Mgmt Fees
findings.action: Renegotiate Mgmt Fees: now 9.3% of revenue, up from 3.8%.
findings.why: Mgmt Fees cost/revenue ratio rose to 9.3% in 2025-07 vs prior avg 3.8% (+146% ratio increase; z=19.30)
